name: Romanian Deadlift
resistance_profile: Tension peaks at the stretched (bottom) position with hips flexed — strong lengthened loading of the hamstrings.
rom_notes: Lower until you feel a strong hamstring stretch without lumbar rounding; range is set by hamstring flexibility, not the floor.
cues: Push the hips back, minimal knee bend
Keep the bar close, dragging up the legs
common_errors: Rounding the lower back to reach the floor
progressions: Add a pause in the stretched position
